name: Thorman Stormhammer
description: *A stout dwarf cleric sits in meditation, his holy symbol glowing softly with divine light.*

character_details.background: Dwarven cleric devoted to the forge god
character_details.personality: Steadfast and protective, values honor and craftsmanship
character_details.motivations: Believes the darkness threatening the land offends his deity
character_details.combat_style: Tank and healer, strong front-line fighter with divine magic
